title: Notification de l'adhésion timorienne

pages.text:
MINISTÈRE DES AFFAIRES ÉTRANGÈRES DU ROYAUME DES PAYS-BAS

LA HAYE

CONVENTIONS CONCLUES À LA HAYE LE 18 OCTOBRE 1907

AU COURS DE LA CONFÉRENCE INTERNATIONALE DE LA PAIX DE 1907

Notification

Convention pour le règlement pacifique des conflits internationaux (La Haye, le 18 octobre 1907)

ADHÉRENCE

Timor oriental, 22-07-2024

La Convention entrera en vigueur pour la République démocratique du Timor oriental, conformément à son article 95, le 20 septembre 2024.

La Haye, le 23 juillet 2024

Les notifications dépositaires sont accessibles en ligne sur le site Web du Ministère des Affaires étrangères du

Royaume des Pays-Bas, à l’adresse https://treatydatabase.overheid.nl

Conventions 1907 No. 02/2024

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS OF THE KINGDOM OF THE NETHERLANDS

THE HAGUE

CONVENTIONS CONCLUDED AT THE HAGUE ON 18 OCTOBER 1907

DURING THE INTERNATIONAL PEACE CONFERENCE OF 1907

Notification

Convention for the Pacific Settlement of International Disputes (The Hague, 18 October 1907)

ADHERENCE

Timor-Leste, 22-07-2024

The Convention will, in accordance with its Article 95, enter into force for the Democratic Republic of

Timor-Leste on 20 September 2024.

The Hague, 23 July 2024

The Depositary Notifications are accessible on the website of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Kingdom of the

Netherlands at https://treatydatabase.overheid.nl

Conventions 1907 No. 02/2024

RDTI

PRIMEIRO-MINISTRO

ACT OF ACCESSION

TO THE CONVENTION FOR THE PACIFIC SETTLEMENT OF INTERNATIONAL

DISPUTES

HAVING REGARD to the Convention for the Pacific Settlement of International Disputes, done at

The Hague on 18 October 1907 (the Convention);

CONSIDERING that, pursuant to a decision of the Administrative Council of the Permanent Court of

Arbitration, all Member States of the United Nations Organisation that do not yet participate in the activities of the Permanent Court of Arbitration were invited to accede to the Convention;

REAFFIRMING the important role of the Permanent Court of Arbitration in the peaceful resolution of disputes;

WHEREAS, the Government of the Democratic Republic of Timor-Leste has decided that the

Democratic Republic of Timor-Leste shall become a Contracting Party to the Convention;

NOW, THEREFORE, the Government of the Democratic Republic of Timor-Leste, having considered the Convention for Pacific Settlement of International Disputes concluded at The Hague on October 18, 1907, declares that the Democratic Republic of Timot-Leste hereby accedes to the Convention and undertakes to carry out faithfully all the provisions contained therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, Kay Rala Xanana Gusmão, the Prime Minister of the Democratic

Republic of Timor-Leste, have signed this Act and affixed my official seal.

DONE at Dili, Timor-Leste, on 8 July 2024

Kay Rala Xanana Grusmão

Prime Minister of the Democratic Republic of Timor-Leste
